PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX psn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/value-normalized/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT(COUNT(DISTINCT ?otherCountry) + 1 AS ?rank) WHERE {
  wd:Q974 psn:P2075 ?dcVal .
  ?otherCountry wdt:P31 wd:Q6256 .
  ?otherCountry wdt:P30 wd:Q923 .
  ?otherCountry psn:P2075 ?otherVal .
  FILTER(?otherVal > ?dcVal)
}
